name: Buster Blader, the Destruction Swordmaster
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い<ruby lang="jp"><rb>手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>て</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－バスター・ブレイダー
desc: This card's name becomes "Buster Blader" while on the field or in the GY. If a monster(s) your opponent controls is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 of those destroyed monsters; equip it to this card. Once per turn: You can send 1 Monster Card you control that is equipped to this card to the GY; destroy all monsters your opponent controls with the same Type as that monster sent to the GY.
mnst_eff: This card's name becomes "Buster Blader" while on the field or in the GY. If a monster(s) your opponent controls is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 of those destroyed monsters; equip it to this card. Once per turn: You can send 1 Monster Card you control that is equipped to this card to the GY; destroy all monsters your opponent controls with the same Type as that monster sent to the GY.
eff: This card's name becomes "Buster Blader" while on the field or in the GY. If a monster(s) your opponent controls is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 of those destroyed monsters; equip it to this card. Once per turn: You can send 1 Monster Card you control that is equipped to this card to the GY; destroy all monsters your opponent controls with the same Type as that monster sent to the GY.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Equips monsters from the opponent's Graveyard to itself
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
Changes own name while in the GY
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
